project_type: React 19 + TypeScript 5.9 + Vite 7 SPA with MUI 6.5, Zustand 5, axios, react-i18next, react-router 7
build_system: Vite 7 with tsc type-checking. tsconfig strict mode with noUnusedLocals and noUnusedParameters. verbatimModuleSyntax enabled.
test_framework: None configured (no test runner in package.json)
test_command: npm run build (type-checking is the verification since no test framework)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` which executes `tsc -b && vite build`. Must pass with zero errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm install available. Node.js v22 via nvm. No test framework configured. tsconfig has strict, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, verbatimModuleSyntax enabled.
contribution_requirements: Brownfield: modify existing files in-place, never create _new copies. All data through src/mock (VITE_USE_MOCK=true default). Type safety with src/types definitions. Follow BR-F1~F10 business rules.
key_patterns: MUI 6.5 component imports (individual @mui/material/Component paths). Zustand stores with persist middleware. react-i18next useTranslation hook. react-router 7 createBrowserRouter. axios instance in services/request.ts. Theme uses getTheme(mode) function. AuthGuard component wraps protected routes. Layout components use Outlet for children.
directory_structure: src/ contains: App.tsx, main.tsx, components/ (AvatarMenu, Layout/), i18n/ (locales/en.json, zh.json), pages/ (Dashboard, Home, Login, NotFound, ShopHome), router/ (AuthGuard, index), services/ (request.ts), store/ (useAppStore, useAuthStore), theme/ (index.ts)
